title: phyllanthus zornioides
intro: Phyllanthus zornioides, also known as the Zorn's phyllanthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting liver health. It is often used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
